chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1032 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.4007/2019 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case (Order sent) (Progress report received) 08.10.2019 Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Deputy Prosecutor General. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioners and their counsel are called absent. Report was called from the concerned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate. The report is received. Since none appeared for the petitioners, apparently, petitioners are no more interested. Now, it is 11:05 a.m. Dismissed on account of non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
